payload.title: [HIGH] SSE per-tenant connection ceiling never enforced (truthiness bug)
payload.description: server.js:483 does `if (!lease)` but ConnectionTracker.acquire() always returns a truthy object ({allowed:false,...} on denial; connections.js:55,59). The SCP-158 ceiling (20/tenant) is dead code; lease.release() is a no-op. A viewer opens unlimited /events streams (socket+listener+keepalive+PG LISTEN each) -> exhausts Fly's 250-conn/machine cap, DoS for all tenants. FIX: check lease.allowed; return 429 + Retry-After; add a test.
